purpose: Recent-complete-season xG shadow research only. No formal probability mutation.

season_scope.policy: Use only matches strictly earlier than each target match when building features. Never use target-match or later xG values as predictors.

source_semantics.reason: Current retrieval does not prove the exact historical pre-match publication timestamp of each prior-match xG observation.
source_semantics.allowed_use: chronological shadow research and signal screening
